subject: Job Application
motivation: I have read your job advertisement with great interest. The opportunity to work in a renowned hospital like Universitätsklinikum Magdeburg and help people motivates me greatly to apply for this position.
qualifications: As a reliable and responsible person, I bring the required qualities for this position. Hygiene and cleanliness have the highest priority for me, which I consider fundamental for work in healthcare. In my previous work, I have always worked well in a team. I can organize well and am communicative, friendly to all people and remain calm and efficient even in stressful situations.
tasks: The tasks mentioned in your advertisement - from food service to courier services to hygienic processing - correspond exactly to my abilities. I understand the importance of these activities for patient well-being and am ready to work with great care and empathy.
future: I find your offer of training and further education opportunities as well as the prospect of a secure job particularly appealing. I am motivated to continuously develop myself and become a long-term part of your team.
availability: I am available immediately and flexible regarding working hours. I would be very pleased about the opportunity to introduce myself in a personal conversation.
closing:
Thank you in advance for your response!
Sincerely,
Mykola Vutov
experience: Several years of experience in the service sector with focus on customer service and teamwork.
education: University degree in computer science with additional qualifications in healthcare.
additional: Willingness to work shifts and weekends. Driver's license class B available.
